tasks.title: Add touristAudience column to owner_promotions
tasks.description: Add `touristAudience` enum column (`'plus' | 'vip'`, default `'plus'`, NOT NULL) to the owner_promotions Drizzle schema (packages/db/src/schemas/owner-promotion/owner_promotion.dbschema.ts). Structural change → generate via `pnpm db:generate`, review the generated migration file under packages/db/src/migrations/, apply with `pnpm db:migrate`. Do NOT use the extras carril (this is a plain column, not a trigger/view/CHECK).

subtasks.title: Add touristAudience enum + column to owner_promotion.dbschema.ts
Run pnpm db:generate and review the generated migration file
Run pnpm db:migrate locally and confirm the column exists with default 'plus'

tasks.title: Add touristAudience to owner-promotion Zod schemas
tasks.description: Update packages/schemas owner-promotion entity schemas (create/update/public schemas) to include `touristAudience` (enum 'plus'|'vip', default 'plus'). Ensure the public schema exposes it (needed by the tourist-facing listing to visually distinguish vip-only deals) and the create/update input schemas accept it as optional (defaulting server-side).

subtasks.title: Add touristAudience to OwnerPromotionCreateSchema / UpdateSchema
Add touristAudience to OwnerPromotionPublicSchema
Unit test: schema accepts valid values, rejects invalid enum values, defaults to 'plus' when omitted

tasks.title: Wire VIP_PROMOTIONS_ACCESS entitlement metadata + plan assignment
tasks.description: In packages/billing/src/config/entitlements.config.ts, add the metadata entry for EntitlementKey.VIP_PROMOTIONS_ACCESS (label, description referencing VIP-only exclusive deals — do not reuse VIP_VISIBILITY_ACCESS's copy, this is a distinct perk). In packages/billing/src/config/plans.config.ts, assign it to the tourist-vip plan's entitlement list. Currently the enum member exists but has zero metadata and zero plan assignment (orphaned since the SPEC-286 rename) — this task fully activates it for this feature.

subtasks.title: Add entitlements.config.ts entry for VIP_PROMOTIONS_ACCESS
Assign VIP_PROMOTIONS_ACCESS to the tourist-vip plan in plans.config.ts
Unit test: tourist-vip plan grants VIP_PROMOTIONS_ACCESS, tourist-plus plan does not

tasks.title: Add i18n strings for exclusive deals page (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Add locale keys under packages/i18n for the exclusive-deals page: page title, empty state ('no hay ofertas activas por ahora' equivalent), upgrade CTA copy (mirroring the existing alerts upgrade-prompt copy), and a VIP-only badge label. Add for all three locales (es default, en, pt) per project i18n convention. Follow packages/i18n/CLAUDE.md structure.

subtasks.title: Add es/en/pt keys for title, empty state, upgrade CTA, VIP-only badge
Run pnpm --filter @repo/i18n generate-types and confirm types compile

tasks.title: Add tourist-audience-aware search to OwnerPromotionService
tasks.description: In packages/service-core/src/services/owner-promotion/ownerPromotion.service.ts, extend the search path (new method or an optional `touristAudience` param on the existing search) so callers can request deals scoped to a tier: plus → touristAudience='plus' only, vip → touristAudience in ('plus','vip'). Must compose with the existing _executeSearch filters (lifecycleState=ACTIVE, planRestricted=false, deletedAt=null, validFrom<=now<=validUntil) — do not duplicate that filtering logic.

subtasks.title: Add touristAudience-scoped search method/param to OwnerPromotionService
Unit test: plus tier excludes 'vip' rows
Unit test: vip tier includes both 'plus' and 'vip' rows
Unit test: planRestricted/expired/soft-deleted rows excluded regardless of tier

tasks.title: Cross-check accommodation-visibility rules in the exclusive-deals search
tasks.description: Locate the existing accommodation-visibility check used by VIP_VISIBILITY_ACCESS (per SPEC-286, in accommodation.service.ts — described as having 8 checks for RESTRICTED/owner-suspended/plan-restricted accommodations). Reuse it (do not re-derive the rule) as a join/exists-filter in the T-005 search path: a deal referencing an accommodationId the caller cannot see is excluded from results, for both plus and vip tiers.

subtasks.title: Locate the existing accommodation-visibility check in accommodation.service.ts
Add exists/join filter to the T-005 search path reusing that check
Unit test: a deal referencing a restricted/suspended accommodation is excluded from results for both tiers

tasks.title: Accept touristAudience in owner-promotion create/update routes
tasks.description: Update apps/api/src/routes/owner-promotion/protected/create.ts and the corresponding update route to accept and persist the `touristAudience` field from T-002's schema. Self-service: any owner who can already create promotions can set touristAudience='vip' on their own, no new role/permission gating (existing _OWN permission model covers it).

subtasks.title: Accept touristAudience in the create route handler
Accept touristAudience in the update route handler
Integration test: owner can create/update a promotion with touristAudience='vip'

tasks.title: Create protected exclusive-deals list route

Request params: page, pageSize, optional accommodationId. Response: { items: OwnerPromotionPublicSchema[], pagination }. Do NOT modify the existing public list.ts endpoint — it stays ungated for the unrelated PromotionBanner use case.

subtasks.title: Create exclusive-deals.ts route file using the list route factory
Wire request/response schemas (page, pageSize, accommodationId; items + pagination)
Register the route in the owner-promotion protected router

tasks.title: Wire gateExclusiveDeals + vip entitlement check into the new route
tasks.description: Wire apps/api/src/middlewares/tourist-entitlements.ts's gateExclusiveDeals() into the T-008 route's middlewares array, following the gateAlerts precedent (apps/api/src/routes/price-alert/protected/create.ts:97 → tourist-entitlements.ts:117-168): entitlement check first, 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED + upgradeUrl:'/suscriptores/planes' if EXCLUSIVE_DEALS is missing. Additionally check VIP_PROMOTIONS_ACCESS (from T-003) to decide whether to pass touristAudience scope 'vip' vs 'plus' into the T-006 search call. This is the task that un-phantoms gateExclusiveDeals — remove the PHANTOM-GATE comment once wired.

tasks.title: E2E test for the full exclusive-deals flow
tasks.description: E2E test covering: tourist-plus browses and sees plus-tier deals only; free tourist sees the upgrade CTA and cannot reach the listing; tourist-vip sees plus-tier deals plus vip-only ones, visually distinguished; a deal on an accommodation-visibility-restricted accommodation never appears in any tier's listing; an owner can mark a promotion VIP-only via the form (T-013) and it appears correctly scoped.

E2E: tourist-vip sees plus + vip-only deals, visually distinguished
E2E: accommodation-visibility-restricted deal never appears
